name: SLS-LEECH BOT
description: High-speed Leech bot for Telegram hosted on Heroku.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API HASH from my.telegram.org

DATABASE_URL.description: Your MongoDB URI for saving settings/users

LOG_CHANNEL.description: The ID of the channel where logs will be sent (starts with -100)

AUTH_CHATS.description: IDs of groups authorized to use the bot, separated by space.
